name: Minimalist Scandinavian Sofa
description: Cozy Scandinavian oak sofa with fabric cushions. Minimalist styling and high-quality material for a calm, modern living room.

name: Oak Wood Study Desk
description: Perfect minimalist desk for a home office. Features real oak wood and an iron metal frame for lasting durability.

name: Ergonomic Task Chair
description: Modern task chair with lumbar support, mesh backing, and height adjustment for all-day comfort.

name: Rustic Coffee Table
description: Teak coffee table with metal legs and a beautiful rustic grain that adds a homely touch to any space.

name: Queen Platform Bed
description: Low-profile queen platform bed with a solid wood frame and a clean, contemporary silhouette.

name: Open Bookshelf Unit
description: Airy open bookshelf with five spacious tiers, ideal for books, plants, and curated decor.

name: Dining Table Set
description: Statement dining table that seats six, crafted from sustainable hardwood with a soft matte finish.

name: Velvet Lounge Chair
description: Plush velvet lounge chair with a brass-toned base, perfect for a reading nook or accent corner.

name: Smart 22" 4K Monitor
description: Ultra-thin 22-inch Full HD IPS monitor with crisp colors, ideal for work and streaming setups.

name: Curved Ultrawide Monitor
description: 49-inch super-ultrawide QLED curved monitor for an immersive workstation or entertainment rig.

name: Portable 2TB Hard Drive
description: Compact and rugged 2TB portable external hard drive with USB 3.0 for backups on the go.

name: 1TB Internal SSD
description: 1TB SATA III internal SSD that boots your system in seconds and accelerates everyday tasks.

name: 256GB Performance SSD
description: 256GB 3D NAND SLC-cache SSD delivering a noticeable speed boost for laptops and desktops.

name: 4TB Gaming Drive
description: 4TB portable gaming drive, formatted for plug-and-play storage across consoles and PCs.
